use_codes.desc: IMPROVE RESPIRATORY SYMPTOMS IN CYSTIC FIBROSIS IN PATIENTS WITH PSEUDOMONAS AERUGINOSA
IMPROVE RESPIRATORY SYMPTOMS IN CYSTIC FIBROSIS IN PATIENTS WITH PSEUDOMONAS AERUGINOSA

indications.text:
CAYSTON® is indicated to improve respiratory symptoms in cystic fibrosis (CF) patients with
Pseudomonas aeruginosa. Safety and effectiveness have not been established in pediatric
patients below the age of 7 years, patients with FEV <25% or >75% predicted, or patients
1
colonized with Burkholderia c...
